caption: A football game is played on a bright green field with white yard markings and a large yellow and red "MANDERS" logo in the end zone. Players in white uniforms and players in black uniforms are engaged in a play. In the initial sequence, a player in white is tackled by several players in black near the 10-yard line. On-screen text indicates "1st & 10", "2nd 2:56", and ":20". A small inset window shows a man with blond hair wearing a dark shirt. As the action progresses, the game state updates to "2nd & 2", "2nd 2:31", and ":10". The players reset their positions on the field, with a player in black labeled "Potamalu" visible. The camera angle shifts from a wide shot of the tackle to a broader view of the field, while the inset of the man remains visible.
